name: stackra/coupon
purpose: Discount code substrate — Coupon + CouponRedemption aggregates with per-use pivots against Memberships, Invoices, or Transactions.
capabilities: Coupon aggregate (cpn_ prefix) — per-tenant discount code config
CouponRedemption pivot (crd_ prefix) — per-use audit trail
when_to_use: A tenant issues discount codes and needs per-use tracking against specific customers and targets.
when_not_to_use: For marketplace-side platform fees, use stackra/marketplace-fee. For coupons on the SaaS plan itself, use stackra/subscription.
